name: Sourdough Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon baking soda dissolved in a splash of water.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients (sourdough starter, sugar, salt) separately from the baking soda solution.
2. Fold the baking soda solution into the dry mixture until combined.
3. Cook on a cast iron skillet, adding a teaspoon of oil halfway through if sticking occurs.
- Spread the oil around and continue cooking.
4. Note that this adjustment improves performance compared to using 4 tablespoons of oil with eggs.
